title: Picture Hook Set - 22 Piece Hard Wall Photo Frame Hanging Set with S M L Hooks
description: Pack of 22 wall hooks with nails for hanging picture frames or photo frames or clocks or other household items on hard or concrete walls Suitable for plasterboard walls and dry walls where standard picture hooks are difficult to use Contains 22 hooks : 5 large size / 8 medium size / 9 small size and a packet of nails
